simutils_tng#

galsyn.simutils_tng.cosmic_times_of_snapshots(snaps, sim='TNG50-1', snaps_info=None, cosmo='Planck18', api_key='api-key')[source]#
galsyn.simutils_tng.cosmic_times_snapshots(sim='TNG50-1', snaps_info=None, cosmo='Planck18', api_key='api-key')[source]#
galsyn.simutils_tng.download_cutout_parent_halo_hdf5(snap_number, subhalo_id, api_key='api-key', sim='TNG50-1', params=None)[source]#
galsyn.simutils_tng.download_cutout_subhalo_hdf5(snap_number, subhalo_id, api_key='api-key', sim='TNG50-1', params=None)[source]#
galsyn.simutils_tng.get(path, params=None)[source]#
galsyn.simutils_tng.get_basic_subhalo_properties(snap_number, subhalo_id, api_key='api-key', sim='TNG50-1', params=None)[source]#
galsyn.simutils_tng.get_num_subhalos(snap_number, sim='TNG50-1', snaps_info=None, api_key='api-key')[source]#
galsyn.simutils_tng.get_snap_z(snap_number, sim='TNG50-1', snaps_info=None, api_key='api-key')[source]#
galsyn.simutils_tng.get_snap_z_batch(snap_numbers, sim='TNG50-1', snaps_info=None, api_key='api-key')[source]#
galsyn.simutils_tng.get_tng_snaps_info(sim='TNG50-1', api_key='api-key')[source]#
galsyn.simutils_tng.make_sim_file_from_tng_data(input_hdf5, z, cosmo_h=0.6774, XH=0.76, output_hdf5='sim_file_tng.hdf5')[source]#
